critical_issues.title: High Order Cancellation Rate Impacting Revenue
critical_issues.root_cause: 14 cancelled orders representing ₹6,27,800 in lost revenue. Cancellation rate of 4.4% is above industry standard of 2-3%. Pattern shows cancellations occur across all order types with no clear kitchen time data to diagnose service delays.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement pre-order confirmation calls for high-value orders (>₹50,000), introduce deposit requirements for dine-in reservations over ₹30,000, and add real-time order tracking to reduce customer uncertainty. Train staff on proactive communication during peak hours.

critical_issues.title: Critical Stock Shortage in High-Demand Protein Items
critical_issues.root_cause: Chicken Breast (422.6kg vs 4,226kg reorder level) at 10% of minimum stock, Eggs (200 vs 501 reorder level) at 40% of minimum, and Fish Fillet showing low stock warnings. These are key ingredients for top-selling items like Smoky Chicken Burger, Crispy Chicken Bites, and Grilled Fish Wrap.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement emergency procurement for Chicken Breast (order 4,000kg immediately), establish automatic reorder triggers at 150% of reorder level, negotiate with backup suppliers for proteins, and implement daily stock monitoring dashboard. Consider menu engineering to promote items with adequate stock.

critical_issues.title: Critical Shortage in Bakery Essentials Limiting Menu Availability
critical_issues.root_cause: Burger Bun (100 vs 331 reorder level) at 30% stock, Dosa Batter (452.4L vs 4,524L reorder level) at 10% stock. These items support high-revenue menu items including burgers (₹30,000 avg) and Masala Dosa orders.
critical_issues.recommendation: Place urgent orders for Burger Buns (minimum 500 units) and Dosa Batter (4,500L). Establish partnership with local bakery for daily morning deliveries. Create contingency menu with alternative items when key ingredients run low. Implement par-level system with safety stock of 200%.

critical_issues.title: Vegetable Inventory at Critical Levels Risking Menu Completeness
critical_issues.root_cause: Capsicum (638.4kg vs 6,384kg reorder level) at 10% of minimum stock and Green Chili (1,645.4kg vs 16,454kg reorder level) at 10% of minimum. These are essential ingredients across 75% of menu items affecting both mains and sides.
critical_issues.recommendation: Establish daily vegetable procurement schedule with local vendors. Order 6,000kg Capsicum and 15,000kg Green Chili immediately. Implement twice-daily delivery system for perishables. Create vegetable usage forecast based on daily order patterns to prevent future shortages.

critical_issues.title: Low Stock in Dairy Products Affecting Multiple Menu Categories
critical_issues.root_cause: Cheese Slice (245 vs 89 reorder level) showing concern but above minimum. However, stock levels are trending low for high-demand items. Lemon stock (1,078 vs 438 reorder level) also requires monitoring given beverage menu dependencies.
critical_issues.recommendation: Increase Cheese Slice par levels to 400 units minimum. Establish daily dairy delivery contracts with 2-day lead time. Monitor usage patterns for beverages requiring lemon. Create substitute ingredient matrix for menu flexibility during shortages.

critical_issues.title: Missing Kitchen Performance Data Preventing Efficiency Analysis
critical_issues.root_cause: Kitchen time data is completely absent for orders from Jan 29 onwards (214 orders). Unable to analyze preparation efficiency, identify bottlenecks, or optimize kitchen workflows. Earlier data shows average kitchen times of 30.9 minutes with high variation (13.7 to 49.1 mins).
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately restore kitchen time tracking system. Install kitchen display system (KDS) with automated timing. Train staff on order status updates. Analyze historical kitchen time data to set item-specific preparation benchmarks. Implement alert system for orders exceeding target times.

critical_issues.title: Incomplete Order Metadata Limiting Business Intelligence
critical_issues.root_cause: Order numbers missing for 214 recent orders (from Jan 29 onwards). Menu item category and prep type data marked as 'Unknown' preventing category performance analysis, kitchen workflow optimization, and accurate demand forecasting.
critical_issues.recommendation: Audit and fix POS system data capture. Implement mandatory field validation for all order entries. Backfill missing data through manual order review where possible. Create data quality dashboard with daily monitoring. Train staff on proper order entry procedures.

critical_issues.title: No Discount or Promotion Strategy Visible
critical_issues.root_cause: Zero discount amounts recorded across all 320 orders. Missing opportunity for strategic promotions during slow periods, loyalty programs, and competitive pricing strategies. No data on customer retention initiatives.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement tiered loyalty program offering 5-10% discounts for repeat customers. Create happy hour promotions (3-5 PM) to drive afternoon traffic. Launch weekend family meal bundles. Track discount effectiveness through updated POS system. Target 5-8% strategic discount rate.
